> home > projects > digital garth > concept art > about
Hey there, I'm Haroon. I'm a student at the University of Maryland and I study Mechanical Engineering. I'm currently studying abroad in Lunds Universitet in Sweden for the Spring 2026 semester. When I return, I'll be entering my senior year, and I'll be a research assistant in the MEMS and Microfluidics lab. I'm also currently the social media manager for the UMD Game Developers Club.

Socials:
  • Discord: @theroonguy
  • Instagram: @theroonguy
  • GitHub: @theroonguy
  • You can probably see the pattern by now...

Haroon Amanullah

Hi! I'm Haroon, a MechE student at the University of Maryland with a few too many creative outlets. Thanks for checking out my site :)
